code:
sequenceDiagram
actor Dev
participant GitHub
participant Runner
Dev->>GitHub: triggers "Docker Build and Push"
GitHub->>Runner: dispatch
loop Docker Build and Push
Runner->>Runner: job build-and-push
Runner-->>Runner: Checkout code
Runner-->>Runner: Set up Docker Buildx
Runner-->>Runner: Log in to Container Registry
Runner-->>Runner: Extract metadata
Runner-->>Runner: Build and push Docker image
Runner-->>Runner: Test Docker image
end
Dev->>GitHub: triggers "Codebase Mindmap"
GitHub->>Runner: dispatch
loop Codebase Mindmap
Runner->>Runner: job build
Runner-->>Runner: Checkout
Runner-->>Runner: Setup Node.js
Runner-->>Runner: Install markmap-cli
Runner-->>Runner: Generate Markdown map
Runner-->>Runner: Build Markmap HTML
Runner-->>Runner: Upload artifact (Infra_LoadBalancer)
Runner-->>Runner: Upload Pages artifact
Runner->>Runner: job deploy
Runner-->>Runner: Deploy to GitHub Pages
end
Dev->>GitHub: triggers "PR Validation"
GitHub->>Runner: dispatch
loop PR Validation
Runner->>Runner: job validate-pr
Runner-->>Runner: Checkout code
Runner-->>Runner: Install PyYAML
Runner-->>Runner: Validate YAML files
Runner-->>Runner: Validate Shell Scripts
end
Dev->>GitHub: triggers "Security Scanning"
GitHub->>Runner: dispatch
loop Security Scanning
Runner->>Runner: job trivy-scan
Runner-->>Runner: Checkout code
Runner-->>Runner: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner in repo mode
Runner-->>Runner: Upload Trivy results to GitHub Security
Runner->>Runner: job docker-scan
Runner-->>Runner: Checkout code
Runner-->>Runner: Build Docker image
Runner-->>Runner: Run Trivy on Docker image
Runner-->>Runner: Upload Docker scan results
Runner->>Runner: job secret-scan
Runner-->>Runner: Checkout code
Runner-->>Runner: TruffleHog OSS
end
repo_description: AegisNet: An advanced, integrated defense solution leveraging AI, autonomous drones, and advanced detection systems for comprehensive situational awareness and security.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个GitHub Actions工作流的时序图，展示开发者触发不同流水线后，GitHub如何调度Runner执行具体任务。核心要体现四类触发：Docker构建推送、代码库思维导图生成、PR验证、还有安全扫描。
明白了，三类参与者：开发者、GitHub平台、Runner执行器。每个触发都是一个loop块吗？还有安全扫描看起来比较复杂，里面是不是包含多个并行的job？
对，安全扫描要拆三个job：Trivy仓库扫描、Docker镜像扫描、还有TruffleHog密钥泄露检测。其他三个触发都是单job或者双job的loop。Docker构建那个loop里要有Checkout、Setup Buildx、登录容器仓库、提取元数据、构建推送、最后测试镜像。

好的，我先画出前两条流水线的结构。Dev触发Docker Build and Push，GitHub dispatch到Runner，然后loop里六个步骤；接着Dev触发Codebase Mindmap，这里有个build job做Checkout、Setup Node.js、安装markmap-cli、生成Markdown、构建HTML、上传artifact，然后deploy job部署到GitHub Pages。这样对吗？
对的，注意那个artifact名称是Infra_LoadBalancer，别写成别的。PR验证那条比较简单：validate-pr job做Checkout、装PyYAML、验证YAML文件、验证Shell脚本。

已加上PR Validation。现在处理最复杂的安全扫描loop：trivy-scan job做Checkout、运行Trivy仓库扫描、上传结果到GitHub Security；docker-scan job同样Checkout、构建镜像、Trivy扫镜像、上传结果；secret-scan job用TruffleHog OSS做密钥扫描。三个job都在同一个Security Scanning loop里并行？
elements_involved: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner in repo mode
Upload Trivy results to GitHub Security

cscw_dialogue.utterance: docker-scan那里，Trivy扫镜像之后应该是"Upload Docker scan results"，你刚才可能漏了Docker这个词，要区分两种上传。另外secret-scan里TruffleHog前面最好加上"Run"更规范。
已修正：docker-scan的最后一步明确为"Upload Docker scan results"，secret-scan改为"Run TruffleHog OSS"。四条流水线全部完成，每条都是Dev触发→GitHub dispatch→Runner执行loop的结构，安全扫描包含三个并行job，其余都是单job或build+deploy双job。请确认最终结构。
确认无误，这个时序图清晰展现了我们CI/CD体系的完整调度流程。
